creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
makc        2009-05-08 07:22:56 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Added files:
    polish/qfaktury      Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
    polish/qfaktury/files patch-QFaktury.desktop 
                          patch-qfaktury.pro 
  Log:
  Add new port polish/qfaktury:
  
  QFaktury is a polish free invoincing system running on Windows,
  Linux, BSD and Mac OS X. Supports invoice, pro forma invoice and
  invoice correction printing. Stores database of invoices, goods and
  contractors.
  
  WWW:    http://qfaktury.sourceforge.net
  
  PR:             ports/133878
  Submitted by:   Piotr Rybicki <meritus@innervision.pl>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.1       +36 -0     ports/polish/qfaktury/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/polish/qfaktury/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +15 -0     ports/polish/qfaktury/files/patch-QFaktury.desktop (new)
  1.1       +23 -0     ports/polish/qfaktury/files/patch-qfaktury.pro (new)
  1.1       +6 -0      ports/polish/qfaktury/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +37 -0     ports/polish/qfaktury/pkg-plist (new)
